items.headline: The Association – Post Up – 4/22/2026
items.description: Recap all the Playoff action around the NBA from April 22, 2026 on The Association: Post Up.

items.headline: Game Recap: Thunder 120, Suns 107
items.description: The Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Phoenix Suns, 120-107, to take a 2-0 series lead.

items.headline: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander puts up 37 as Thunder take 2-0 series lead
items.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander recorded his 29th career postseason game with 25+ points for the Oklahoma City Thunder with 37 in Game 2.
